label: Subagent spawned
description: Task tool 建完 subsession，標 source='task-tool'

transitions.condition: tool-call round completed, about to dispatch next request
not task-tool subagent OR gate disabled (log would-have-trip if disabled)

label: Gate: probe quota
description: Call AccountQuotaProbe registry for pinned accountId

transitions.condition: probe unavailable / failed → WARN log, let subagent proceed (DD-14)

label: Gate: evaluate threshold + dispatch by source
description: min(5H, weekly) < threshold? If trip, dispatch by session.source

transitions.condition: trip AND source='task-tool' → subagent cancel path
trip AND source in ('user-initiated', null) → main rotate path
trip AND source in ('mcp-handover', other) → noop

label: Main: pick healthiest candidate
description: Best-available by 5H remaining, exclude self + cooldowned + probe-fail

transitions.condition: candidate exists AND cooldown not active
no candidate OR cooldown active OR all probes failed

label: Main: re-pin with override + emit banner

transitions.condition: next provider request uses new pin

label: Main: hard-stop fallback
description: Append user-audience summary as assistant/system message, finish turn
actions: append assistant message with structured quota-alert content

label: Generate structured summary
description: mechanical scan of messages + SharedContext + TodoWrite state

label: Return TaskResult to parent
description: Task tool result = {tripped:true, reason, triggerWindow, remainingPercent, summary, sharedContext}

label: Gate-tripped termination
description: parent received structured trip result; parent LLM decides next step
